positive: Intricate celestial botanical pattern, featuring stylized bioluminescent night flora intertwined with abstract constellations and crescent moon motifs. The composition must be highly symmetric and centrally focused, suitable for a repeat apparel print. Style: Neo-Victorian engraved etching mixed with clean, modern line art. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, glowing cyan, and matte gold accents. The lines should be crisp, thick, and clean, providing strong silhouettes and excellent contrast against a neutral background. Composition must feel ethereal, magical, and highly detailed, rendered as a flat, print-ready graphic design.
